title: Minty Korean Tofu Wrap
description: Floral and crisp brunch wrap with silky tofu, fresh mint, and dashi broth, seasoned with Korean spices and wrapped in a crisp lettuce leaf, cooked on a raclette grill for a unique macrobiotic bite.
instructions: Press tofu between paper towels for 15 minutes to remove excess moisture.
Whisk tofu cubes with soy sauce, sesame oil, and gochugaru for 5 minutes to marinate.
Simmer dashi powder in 100 ml of hot water until fully dissolved, then let cool to 40°C.
Toss marinated tofu with cooled dashi, rice vinegar, and chopped mint, mixing gently.
Lay a lettuce leaf on the raclette grill preheated to 180°C and spread a thin layer of tofu mixture, sprinkling toasted sesame seeds.
Close the leaf around the filling and press lightly for 2 minutes to seal and warm the wrap.
Remove from grill, let rest 1 minute, then serve immediately.
